title: sambucus bipinnata
intro: Sambucus bipinnata, also known as Chinese elder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Korea, belonging to the Adoxaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sambucus bipinnata include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Sambucus bipinnata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
